textByHash.ac8f8ad2e358f13cdc385d11ae593eb6de70cfaa: What do you want? We're trying to sing! Leave us alone and we won't bother you!
textByHash.169aaa4fef3b94f5eeb484bbdef454f084a6bea0: Where are you going? Can we come too?
textByHash.49d09086c95dd080bd4c7ccbc4cf6677411a1c48: Why do you resort to violence so often?
textByHash.a7ab8b09fb97f074ce9b39c8f78e204e0c3f59f7: If you should think of cutting a tree, don't do it!
textByHash.b6ae79ef7492486340d45e2ec973e3959ed02546: We do hope we are not too annoying!
textByHash.e38e742539fd1a5ab4408a3c32bea15dc7efffb2: Look at that outfit! Can't you afford a decent one?
textByHash.51de400755d9e1bfc1078b55043172b783bd20ee: Are you going to craft cosmic runes? Can we come too?
textByHash.f190ce372bf2684904b87b16ad9ed20e1068915b: Just go about your business and ignore us!
